## 0.1.28 Highlights

1. API model mode now reads live Minecraft context before planning, including player state and nearby block scans from the Minecraft plugin.
2. The Web UI setup flow is cleaner: first-run model configuration stays available, while the noisy local API-mode hint is removed.
3. Fabric and Paper player messages are localized, and the player's client language is passed through planning and command responses.
4. Player commands are simpler: use `/bw <request>` for natural-language actions and `/bw web` to open the local Web UI.
5. Execution feedback is clearer for item delivery, placement stats, scans, replans, and controlled build actions.

Download the universal Fabric jar from the assets below.

Full Changelog: https://github.com/mari0w/blockwright/compare/v0.1.27...v0.1.28
